use_cases: Displaying weekly budget or spending data with interactive hover states in analytics dashboards
Visualizing daily metrics with smooth curved charts and area fills in SaaS platforms
Tracking financial trends in fintech applications with hover-reveal data points
Building bento-style analytics grid layouts for dashboard components
Monitoring KPI trends with smooth bezier curve visualizations
ai_summary: An interactive analytics bento card featuring an SVG-based weekly chart with smooth bezier curved lines, gradient area fills, and hover interactions. The component displays daily values (Sunday through Saturday) with dynamic tooltip-style highlighting on hover. Designed for building modern bento-style dashboard layouts in SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce analytics platforms.
